# Copilot Instructions

- This is a Python CLI tool for fixing Fallout: New Vegas audio crackling
- Patches INI audio settings (Viva New Vegas recommended fix)
- No external dependencies (no FFmpeg needed)
- Targets Python 3.8+ compatibility
- Uses `pyproject.toml` with setuptools for packaging
- Tests use pytest
- Entry point: `fnv-audio-fix` CLI command
